title: DEERC Remote Control Car 1:10 Scale RC Cars 48+ KM/H High Speed 40+Min Play, 4WD All Terrains Off Road Radio RC for Adults and Kids Hobby RC Truck Vehicle, 2 Battery Crawler Toy Gift for Boys
features: 1:10 Realistic Scale High Speed RC Car: This RC car equipped with all-terrain tires and upgraded powerful motor, achieve up to 48 Km/h high speed, gives you a greater competitiveness in drag racing. Full scale of speed control , offers a smooth speed varies and high-frequency acceleration, delivers a real-world driving experience for maximum fun and high-speed thrills.

4WD Metal Oil Shock Absorbers: This 4 wheel driving car adopted with independent suspension and metal oil shocks absorber, which can effectively protect car from crashes and dropping, increased durability, offers good all-around driving capability, provided the freedom to drive where you want to drive through water, mud, sand, grass and other conditions that wouldn't have been possible before.

2.4Ghz Anti Interference Control System: The 2.4G frequency provides a quick-responsive control, the max operating range up to 100M (330ft) which is much far than other rc cars, allow you to race alongside with other vehicles without any interference. This hobby grade truck is designed for beginner and intermediate level users who want to move towards to high-end hobby grade or just step out of the general RC car.

High Toughness Shell And Reinforced Body Frame: The whole shell of this remote-control truck is made of high toughness PVC material, give the truck a better collision resistance to prolong its life cycle. Using a reinforced body frame provides the car a better grip while racing.

Extended Driving time and Worry-less Play: Comes with 2 powerful 1500mAh rechargeable batteries, extend the driving time up to 40 minutes. The protective functions like waterproof, low voltage detection, thermal shutdown protection, makes this car perfect for any ages!
description: Product Description ALLOY DIFFERENTIAL This magic parts enables left and right wheels be turned in the opposite direction and more stable when the car is turning at a high speed. POWERFUL 540 MOTOR Brushed 540 Motor - Includes a powerful modified brushed 540 motor, with a four-wheel drive system bursts out continuous strong power. 2.4GHz STABLE CONTROL The 2.4G control system ensures fast responsive and stable control, even at a remote control distance of 100 meters. REINFORCED FRAME & STRUCTURE Full vehicle transmission components and upgraded chassis strength greatly strengthens the internal solid structure and ensure the high speed driving.
